description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with a large central swimming pool surrounded by a spacious patio and landscaped gardens. The structure includes a single-story residential building with multiple rooms, visible through a partially open roof, and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The backyard is lushly landscaped with trees, shrubs, and decorative elements, including a circular gazebo and seating areas. The pool area is flanked by sun loungers and shaded by pergolas, while the front and side yards are enclosed by low walls. The exterior is finished in a combination of neutral tones, with black, white, and beige walls, and the roof is predominantly flat. Large windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern single-story house with a central swimming pool, landscaped gardens, and open-plan living spaces, featuring flat roofs and large windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the interior room layout, the central pool, and the landscaped backyard with trees and a gazebo.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct view of the pool area, sun loungers, and the lush garden, emphasizing the outdoor living spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the garden and gazebo, with the pool and house structure visible in the background, showcasing the open backyard.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house's front facade, the main entryway, and the arrangement of rooms, with the pool and garden extending behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a clean, open approach with no porch or columns, emphasizing modern simplicity.
